NbuUW9i-mHs.3: actually seems to be going out of fashion, while the global population is
NbuUW9i-mHs.4: at an all-time high. It seems that we live in the most peaceful period in
NbuUW9i-mHs.5: human history. How is this possible?
NbuUW9i-mHs.6: As of September 2014, there were four conflicts going on in the world that had
NbuUW9i-mHs.7: caused at least 10,000 people to die since January 2013. Nine conflicts that
NbuUW9i-mHs.8: killed more than 1,000 people and 13 that killed more than 100 since January

nCwwVjPNloY.0: I was a Marine with 1-1 Weapons Company, 81's platoon now in Camp Pendleton, California.
nCwwVjPNloY.1: I joined a few months after September 11th, feeling like I think most people in the country
nCwwVjPNloY.2: did at the time, filled with a sense of patriotism and retribution and the desire to do something
nCwwVjPNloY.3: that coupled with the fact that I wasn't doing anything.
nCwwVjPNloY.4: I was 17, just graduated from high school that past summer, living in the back room
nCwwVjPNloY.5: of my parents' house, paying rent in the small town I was raised in northern Indiana called Mishawaka.
nCwwVjPNloY.6: I could spell that later for people who are interested.
nCwwVjPNloY.7: Mishawaka is many good things, but cultural hub of the world it is not, so my only exposure
nCwwVjPNloY.8: to theater and film was limited to the plays I did in high school and blockbuster video.
nCwwVjPNloY.9: I was serious enough about acting.
